description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall finishes, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a prominent main entrance. The backyard includes a green lawn, a patio area with outdoor furniture, a hot tub, and several trees, all enclosed by a light-colored privacy fence. The house also has a visible garage door and a paved driveway. The windows are arranged in wide horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced backyard featuring a patio and hot tub. The design is minimalist with both dark and light exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a glimpse of the backyard with trees and a lawn.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the flat roof, light exterior walls, and the backyard area with trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio area, hot tub, and the L-shaped layout of the house with a privacy fence.
description_view_3: Backyard-focused view showing the garage door, patio, hot tub, green lawn, and outdoor furniture within the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flush with facade, and surrounded by large windows
